response.justification: The role demands 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle and capital-markets or fixed-income domain knowledge. This candidate is a strong generalist (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but has only brief C/C++ exposure from a 2014–2015 National Instruments stint and a university thesis, no recent C++, no SQL Server/Oracle, no Windows-platform focus, and no fixed-income experience. The RIDE Capital role touches investment but was built on a Node/GraphQL stack, not C++ capital-markets systems. The core mandatory requirements are essentially unmet.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across many stacks
Some prior C/C++ work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience (years short of 5–10)
No SQL Server/Oracle; no Windows-platform development focus
No fixed-income or capital-markets C++ domain experience
